description: Catalog of presentation purposes available in the openpresentation.org catalog. Each entry is a lightweight summary; full purpose records live in the per-id JSON files alongside this index. Purposes are referenced from OPF documents via purpose.

records.name: Inform
records.summary: Give the audience clear context, facts, or status without asking for a decision.

records.name: Drive a Decision
records.summary: Frame options, evidence, tradeoffs, and a recommendation so the audience can choose.

records.name: Align
records.summary: Create shared understanding and commitment across people who need to move together.

records.name: Persuade
records.summary: Change belief or win support for a specific argument, idea, or recommendation.

records.name: Educate
records.summary: Teach a concept, process, product, or domain so the audience can use it correctly.

records.name: Report
records.summary: Summarize performance, progress, or findings with enough context to interpret results.

records.name: Pitch
records.summary: Present an opportunity and ask for investment, approval, partnership, or sponsorship.

records.name: Sell
records.summary: Move a buyer or evaluator toward purchase, adoption, renewal, or expansion.

records.name: Plan
records.summary: Establish a roadmap, operating plan, or sequence of actions with owners and next steps.
